scope: Agent degraded provider contract, OpenRouter adapter translation, loop/SSE events, stream parsing, and apply/reject filtering

behavior: No-provider API behavior is explicit degraded 503/provider status instead of silent mock success.
OpenRouter adapter maps internal messages/tools to provider format and provider tool_calls back to internal tool_use blocks using injected fetch tests.
Agent loop/SSE emits reasoning/analyze/proposal/done behavior and the web stream parser handles chunking/CRLF/error/incomplete stream cases.
Web apply/reject UX now has targeted evidence that rejected proposed actions are excluded from execute and only selected actions are sent.

tests: cmd /c "node_modules\\.bin\\vitest.cmd run apps/api/src/agent/agentProviderDegraded.test.ts apps/api/src/agent/openRouterProvider.test.ts apps/api/src/agent/agentLoop.test.ts" -> 3 files passed; 15 tests passed
cmd /c "node_modules\\.bin\\vitest.cmd run apps/web/src/workspace/agent/agent-stream.test.ts apps/web/src/workspace/agent/agent-surface.test.tsx" -> 2 files passed; 6 tests passed

remainingRisk: No live OpenRouter/Anthropic provider smoke was run because provider keys are absent. Real network/provider quality and live browser SSE traversal remain unverified.
